purpose: Record the first 8xMI350 S4096 GBS128 TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 Flash sparse shared-KV + LI target-shape run with MORI+AITER routed padded MoE and safe-auto shared-KV scatter.
command_shape: RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_mori_sharedkv_likl_8x_s4096_gbs128_steps2_safeauto_20260602T000000 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot MASTER_PORT=29581 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

target_comparison.step2: above target throughput band and faster than target step-time band

read: This is the first retained 8xMI350 target-shape sparse shared-KV + LI systems pass. It proves the direct TorchTitan FSDP8/EP8 sparse path is multi-step stable with safe scatter and MORI+AITER routed padded MoE. It is not final kernel-performance proof: shared-KV backward remains a prototype explicit/Triton bridge, LI/compressor backward are not fused, and MoE backward still uses the padded PyTorch owner-rank VJP.
